faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Most in-stock items ship within 3-5 business days. Night & Day Furniture frames and casegoods typically arrive within 1-2 weeks. Murphy cabinet beds may take 2-3 weeks due to freight shipping requirements. KD Frames platform beds ship from Athens, GA and usually arrive within 5-7 business days.

faqs.question: Do you offer free shipping?
faqs.answer: We offer free standard shipping on orders over $1,999. For orders under that threshold, shipping rates are calculated based on your location and the items ordered. Local delivery in the Hendersonville, NC area is available for $149, and regional white-glove delivery is $249.

faqs.question: Do you ship to all 50 states?
faqs.answer: Yes, we ship to all 50 US states. However, shipping to Hawaii and Alaska may incur additional freight charges. Please contact us for a shipping quote to these locations.

faqs.question: Can I pick up my order in store?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can pick up your order at our Hendersonville, NC showroom. Select 'In-Store Pickup' at checkout. We'll notify you when your order is ready for pickup.

faqs.question: What is white-glove delivery?
faqs.answer: White-glove delivery includes in-home delivery, unpacking, assembly, and removal of all packaging materials. Local white-glove delivery (within 50 miles of Hendersonville, NC) is $149. Regional white-glove delivery is $249. This service is highly recommended for Murphy cabinet beds and larger furniture pieces.

faqs.question: What is the difference between a futon frame and a sofa bed?
faqs.answer: A futon frame uses a separate mattress that folds with the frame, giving you the flexibility to choose your comfort level. Sofa beds have a built-in mattress mechanism that folds out. Futons are generally more comfortable for everyday sleeping because you can select a high-quality mattress, and they're easier to convert between sofa and bed positions.

faqs.question: What sizes do futon frames come in?
faqs.answer: Most of our futon frames are available in Full (54" x 75") and Queen (60" x 80") sizes. Some models like the KD Lounger are also available in Twin size. Wall hugger frames from Strata Furniture also come in Twin Chair, Loveseat, and Loveseat with Ottoman configurations.

faqs.question: What is a MoonGlider operating system?
faqs.answer: The MoonGlider is Night & Day Furniture's innovative front-loading operating system that allows you to effortlessly convert your futon from sofa to bed position. It features a smooth gliding mechanism — no lifting or wrestling with heavy frames. Simply pull the front rail forward and the back drops down to create a flat sleeping surface.

faqs.question: What is a wall hugger futon frame?
faqs.answer: A wall hugger futon frame converts from sofa to bed without needing to be pulled away from the wall. The frame's mechanism slides forward as it unfolds, so you can place it directly against a wall. This is ideal for small spaces. We carry wall hugger frames from Strata Furniture (Durango, Rockwell, Denali) which are the only true zero-tolerance wall hugger futons on the market.

faqs.question: What wood are the futon frames made from?
faqs.answer: Night & Day Furniture frames are crafted from plantation-grown Malaysian rubberwood — a sustainable, non-rainforest hardwood. KD Frames products are made from kiln-dried Tulip Poplar harvested in the mountains of Virginia and manufactured in Athens, GA. Log futons are constructed from Norway Pine with mortise and tenon joinery.

faqs.question: What finishes are available?
faqs.answer: Night & Day Furniture frames are available in Cherry, Black Walnut, Dark Chocolate, and Natural finishes, with some models also offering White, Warm Cherry, and Stonewash Gray. Strata Furniture frames come in Warm Cherry, Dark Cherry, Black Walnut, and Gray. KD Frames products are unfinished Tulip Poplar that you can stain or finish to match your decor.

faqs.question: Do I need a box spring with a platform bed?
faqs.answer: No! All of our platform beds have built-in slat systems that fully support your mattress — no box spring or foundation needed. The slat spacing (2.8" on KD Frames, varies on Night & Day models) accommodates memory foam, latex, innerspring, and hybrid mattresses.

faqs.question: What is the weight capacity of your platform beds?
faqs.answer: KD Frames platform beds (Nomad, Charleston, Lexington, Ekko, Folding) support up to 600 pounds. Night & Day Furniture platform beds in the Spices collection support similar weight loads. Murphy cabinet beds support up to 500 pounds.

faqs.question: Can I adjust the height of the platform bed?
faqs.answer: Yes! Night & Day Furniture Spices beds can be set up in two heights: 13.5" (P-Series low profile) or 16.3" (K-Series standard). KD Frames beds come with 15" standard legs, with optional 12" or 18" leg sets available for purchase separately.

faqs.question: Can I add storage under the platform bed?
faqs.answer: Yes! KD Frames beds are compatible with rolling storage drawers and a twin trundle bed that fits underneath. Night & Day Spices beds work with Cinnamon Storage Drawers and the Cinnamon Trundle. These accessories require the standard or tall leg height (not the low-profile 12" option).

faqs.question: How does a Murphy cabinet bed work?
faqs.answer: A Murphy cabinet bed converts from a compact, attractive cabinet to a full-size bed in under 60 seconds. When closed, it takes up only about 10 square feet of floor space. Simply open the cabinet doors and pull the bed platform forward — the mattress unfolds automatically. No wall mounting is required, unlike traditional Murphy wall beds.

faqs.question: Do Murphy cabinet beds come with a mattress?
faqs.answer: Yes! All of our Murphy cabinet beds include a tri-fold gel-infused memory foam mattress designed to stow inside the cabinet. The mattress is typically 6" thick and provides comfortable sleeping for guests. Premium models like the Daisy, Poppy, and Sagebrush also include built-in power/USB modules and flip-up side trays.

faqs.question: Do I need to mount the Murphy cabinet bed to the wall?
faqs.answer: No. Unlike traditional Murphy wall beds, our cabinet beds are completely freestanding. They sit on the floor like any other piece of furniture and can be moved by two people. No wall mounting, no installation, no contractor needed.

faqs.question: What sizes are Murphy cabinet beds available in?
faqs.answer: Most Murphy cabinet beds are available in Queen size. The Orion model is available in Twin and Full sizes. The San Sebastian and Murphy Express are available in Twin, Full, and Queen. The premium flower series (Daisy, Poppy, Sagebrush, Clover, Ranchero) are Queen-only.

faqs.question: What futon mattresses do you carry?
faqs.answer: We carry Otis Bed futon mattresses, handcrafted in the USA. Models range from the affordable Haley 110 (medium-firm foam) to the premium Moonshadow (ultra-plush all-foam). We also carry the Arizona boutique line (Mesa, Flagstaff, Chandler, Sedona, and more) available in our Hendersonville showroom. All Otis mattresses are TRUE 8" thick with 14" of materials compressed for maximum support.

faqs.question: How do I choose between firm and soft?
faqs.answer: For primarily sitting use (TV room, living room), a medium to medium-firm mattress like the Haley 110 or Flagstaff works well. For everyday sleeping, the Moonshadow (plush) or Cambridge (soft-medium) provide excellent comfort. The Mesa 3000 and Sedona are our firmest options. Visit our Hendersonville showroom to try them in person — the Arizona boutique line is available exclusively in-store.

faqs.question: Can I use a regular mattress on a futon frame?
faqs.answer: No. Regular mattresses are not designed to fold and will be damaged by futon frame mechanisms. Futon mattresses are specifically engineered to fold without losing their shape or support. For platform beds, you can use any mattress — memory foam, latex, innerspring, or hybrid.

faqs.question: How long do futon mattresses last?
faqs.answer: Otis Bed futon mattresses are designed for 10-12+ years of everyday use. Their proprietary Compression Lace Tufting (CLT) process locks the internal materials together so the mattress maintains its comfort level over time. Higher-end models like the Moonshadow and Gemini II may last even longer with proper care.

faqs.question: How difficult is assembly?
faqs.answer: Most futon frames assemble in 30-60 minutes with basic tools. Night & Day Furniture frames come with clear instructions and all necessary hardware. KD Frames platform beds are designed for easy assembly with clearly labeled parts. Murphy cabinet beds from the premium flower series (Daisy, Poppy, etc.) require no assembly at all — they arrive fully assembled. The Murphy Cube and San Sebastian are also fully assembled.

faqs.question: How do I care for my wood furniture?
faqs.answer: Dust regularly with a soft, dry cloth. For deeper cleaning, use a slightly damp cloth and dry immediately. Avoid placing furniture in direct sunlight to prevent finish fading. For unfinished KD Frames products, you can apply your choice of stain, paint, or clear finish. Rubberwood furniture benefits from occasional treatment with furniture polish.

faqs.question: What is your warranty policy?
faqs.answer: Night & Day Furniture offers a limited lifetime warranty on their frames and a 10-year warranty on casegoods. Murphy cabinet beds carry a 10-year limited warranty on the cabinet and a 3-year warranty on the included mattress. KD Frames products carry a manufacturer's warranty. Otis Bed mattresses include a warranty against manufacturing defects. Contact us for specific warranty details.

faqs.question: Where is Carolina Futons located?
faqs.answer: Our showroom is located in Hendersonville, North Carolina, in the beautiful Blue Ridge Mountains. We've been serving western North Carolina and beyond with quality futon furniture, platform beds, and Murphy cabinet beds.

faqs.question: Can I visit your showroom?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our Hendersonville showroom features our full product line where you can sit, lie down, and experience every frame and mattress before you buy. Our Arizona boutique mattress line is available exclusively in-store. Our knowledgeable staff can help you find the perfect furniture for your space.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer financing options through Afterpay, which lets you split your purchase into 4 interest-free payments. We also accept all major credit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
